Package ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3

Class GraphAdjacencyList<V,​E>

  • java.lang.Object
    • ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.GraphAdjacencyList<V,​E>
  • Type Parameters:
    V - Type of vertices values
    E - Type of edges values
    public class GraphAdjacencyList<V,​E>
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a graph using the adjacency matrix.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected java.lang.Integer edgesCount  
      protected java.lang.Integer verticesCount  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      GraphAdjacencyList()
      Creates new graph object.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description

      Adds edge with specific value to the graph.

      Adds a vertex with the specific value to the graph.
      java.util.List<java.lang.Boolean> addVertices​(V[] values)
      Adds new vertices with specific values to the graph.
      boolean containsEdge​(E value)
      Checks if the graph contains the specific edge.

      Checks if the graph contains the specific vertex.
      protected ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph.Edge getEdge​(E val)
      Returns an edge with the specific value.
      V getEdgeFrom​(E value)
      Returns vertex where edge with the specific value begins.
      java.util.List<E> getEdgesByVertices​(V vertexFrom, V vertexTo)
      Returns list of edges which starts with vFrom and ends with vTo vertices.
      int getEdgesCount()
      Returns count of edge in the graph.
      V getEdgeTo​(E value)
      Returns vertex where edge with the specific value ends.
      java.lang.Double getEdgeWeight​(E value)
      Returns weight of edge with the specific value.
      protected ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph.Vertex getVertex​(V val)
      Returns a vertex with the specific value.

      Returns count of vertex in the graph.

      Removes edge with the specific value from the graph.

      Removes edge with the specific value from the graph.

      Changes incident vertices of the specific edge.

      Changes value of the specific edge.

      Changes weight of the specific edge.

      Changes value of the specific vertex of the graph.

    • Method Detail

      • getVertex

        protected ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph.Vertex getVertex​(V val)
                                                             throws java.util.NoSuchElementException
        Returns a vertex with the specific value.
        Parameters:
        val - value of vertex to return
        Returns:
        vertex with the specific value
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if there is no any vertex with the specific value

      • getVertexIncidents

        protected java.util.Set<ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph.Edge> getVertexIncidents​(ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph.Vertex v)

      • getEdge

        protected ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph.Edge getEdge​(E val)
                                                         throws java.util.NoSuchElementException
        Returns an edge with the specific value.
        Parameters:
        val - value of edge to return
        Returns:
        edge with the specific value
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if there is no any edge with the specific value

      • addVertex

        public boolean addVertex​(V val)
        Adds a vertex with the specific value to the graph.
        Parameters:
        val - value of vertex to add
        Returns:
        false if graph is already contains the vertex with the specific value

      • addEdge

        public boolean addEdge​(V vertexFrom,
                       V vertexTo,
                       java.lang.Double w,
                       E val)
        Adds edge with specific value to the graph.
        Parameters:
        vertexFrom - vertex where edge begins
        vertexTo - vertex where edge ends
        w - weight of a new edge
        val - value of a new edge
        Returns:
        false if edge with the specific value is already in the graph.

      • removeEdge

        public void removeEdge​(E val)
        Removes edge with the specific value from the graph.
        Parameters:
        val - value of edge to remove

      • removeVertex

        public void removeVertex​(V val)
        Removes edge with the specific value from the graph.
        Parameters:
        val - value of vertex to remove

      • setEdgeIncidents

        public void setEdgeIncidents​(E val,
                             V vertexFrom,
                             V vertexTo)
        Changes incident vertices of the specific edge.
        Parameters:
        val - value of the edge to change
        vertexFrom - vertex where edge has to begin
        vertexTo - vertex where edge has to end

      • getEdgesByVertices

        public java.util.List<E> getEdgesByVertices​(V vertexFrom,
                                            V vertexTo)
        Returns list of edges which starts with vFrom and ends with vTo vertices.
        Parameters:
        vertexFrom - start vertex of edge to get
        vertexTo - end vertex of edge to get
        Returns:
        list of edges which starts with vFrom and ends with vTo vertices

      • getVertexIncidentsOut

        protected java.util.Set<ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph.Edge> getVertexIncidentsOut​(ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph.Vertex v)

      • containsVertex

        public boolean containsVertex​(V value)
        Checks if the graph contains the specific vertex.
        Parameters:
        value - value to check if the graph contains it
        Returns:
        true if graph contains vertex with specific value

      • containsEdge

        public boolean containsEdge​(E value)
        Checks if the graph contains the specific edge.
        Parameters:
        value - value to check if the graph contains it
        Returns:
        true if graph contains edge with specific value

      • addVertices

        public java.util.List<java.lang.Boolean> addVertices​(V[] values)
        Adds new vertices with specific values to the graph.
        Parameters:
        values - values to add to the graph
        Returns:
        list of boolean for each input value: false if such element is already in the graph

      • setVertexValue

        public void setVertexValue​(V prevVal,
                           V newVal)
        Changes value of the specific vertex of the graph.
        Parameters:
        prevVal - value of vertex to change
        newVal - value to which specific vertex has to change

      • setEdgeWeight

        public java.lang.Double setEdgeWeight​(E value,
                                      java.lang.Double weight)
        Changes weight of the specific edge.
        Parameters:
        value - value of edge to modify
        weight - new weight of the specific edge
        Returns:
        previous weight of the specific edge

        public void setEdgeValue​(E prevVal,

        newVal - value to which specific edge has to change
